subject: Added AAF Integration related changes
commit_message:
Added AAF Integration related changes

Created two profiles for the application
to run. Basic profile will allow the
application to run in the current
spring security authentication. AAF profile
will authenticate and authorize requests with
AAF. if no profile is given, it will fallback
to basic.

Change-Id: I2576f02e7afca3c10e02aaffef66a60fa1c4dd1a
Issue-ID: SO-2451
Signed-off-by: Ramesh Parthasarathy(rp6768)<ramesh.parthasarathy@att.com>

Need to support HTTPS, too.

Patch Set 1:

If we can move the SecurityFilters.java and SoCadiFilter to a comment place somehow it would be great. Could you check?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This change could break existing CSIT for service instantiation done for ETSI feature and on going work for vnf instantiation CSIT test. I think, as part of this task "service instantiation" CSIT test should be fixed as well

link to service instantiation CSIT test
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=integration/csit.git;a=tree;f=plans/so/integration-etsi-testing;h=55bd972cd0ece12b58034899a7538d225236fdaf;hb=refs/heads/master

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> link to service instantiation CSIT test
> https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=integration/csit.git;a=tree;f=plans/so/integration-etsi-testing;h=55bd972cd0ece12b58034899a7538d225236fdaf;hb=refs/heads/master

We know this will not properly work,until the A AF side is also configured.  This changeset is just to show what we have to do.  It is not ready for merge yet.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

Please also apply to vnfc adapter, and other missing sub projects.  We also need to automate the setup of the AAF permissions.  I spoke with Jerry Flood, it seems he has some scripts that can do this within an in it container.  Please follow up with him
